revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十二]][[zh:六月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十二]][[zh:六月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十二]][[zh:六月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十二]][[zh:六月十二]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 12|qq=June 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} , {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Iruka|en|Soga no Iruka|qid=Q736621|lt=Soga no Iruka|1=Soga no Iruka}} was assassinated, marking the beginning of the {{ill|Taika Reform|en|Taika Reform|qid=Q570140|lt=Taika Reform|1=Taika Reform}} . * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}} , {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} ) – {{ill|Matthew C. Perry|en|Matthew C. Perry|qid=Q61855|lt=Matthew Perry|1=Matthew C. Perry}} agreed to delay the response to the U.S. letter until the following year and withdrew from Uraga Bay, heading toward the {{ill|Ryukyu Islands|ja|琉球諸島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryukyu Islands|1=Ryukyu Islands|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10905515}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 13|en|July 13|qid=Q2687|lt=July 13|1=July 13}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|Sakamoto Ryōma|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakamoto Ryōma|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} wrote the {{ill|Senchū Hassaku|ja|船中八策|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senchū Hassaku|1=Senchū hassaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8191633}} aboard a domain vessel traveling from Nagasaki to Hyōgo.
== Births == * Year 6 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|qid=Q2694|lt=July 7|1=July 7}} , {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} ) – {{ill|Hashimoto Reiko|ja|橋本麗子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashimoto Reiko|1=Hashimoto Reiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11544084}} , eldest daughter of {{ill|Hashimoto Sanemi|ja|橋本実麗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashimoto Sanemi|1=Hashimoto Mirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11543911}} (d. {{ill|1889|en|1889|qid=Q7831|lt=1889|1=1889}} )
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} , {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Iruka|en|Soga no Iruka|qid=Q736621|lt=Soga no Iruka|1=Soga no Iruka}} , son of {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=蘇我蝦夷|qid=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1292368}} * Year 1 of {{ill|Shōwa (1312–1317)|en|Shōwa (1312–1317)|qid=Q1324807|lt=Shōwa (Kamakura period)|1=Shōwa (1312–1317)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 16|en|July 16|qid=Q2731|lt=July 16|1=July 16}} , {{ill|1312|en|1312|qid=Q5734|lt=1312|1=1312}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Munenobu|en|Hōjō Munenobu|qid=Q2037124|lt=Hōjō Munenari|1=Hōjō Munenobu}} , 11th {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (b. {{ill|1259|en|1259|qid=Q5507|lt=1259|1=1259}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} , {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}} ) – {{ill|Kobayakawa Takakage|en|Kobayakawa Takakage|qid=Q1143508|lt=Kobayakawa Takakage|1=Kobayakawa Takakage}} , warlord and third son of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1156545}} (b. {{ill|1533|en|1533|qid=Q6443|lt=1533|1=1533}} ) * Year 11 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 13|en|July 13|qid=Q2687|lt=July 13|1=July 13}} , {{ill|1761|en|1761|qid=Q7649|lt=1761|1=1761}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieshige|en|Tokugawa Ieshige|qid=Q323443|lt=Tokugawa Ieshige|1=Tokugawa Ieshige}} , 9th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1711|en|1711|qid=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|11|6|13|5|12|7|6|0612|qq=}}
